zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Cate於1557年4月17日出生在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓時，她的父親Robert Cate31歲，母親Margaret Bagwell27歲。她於1582年5月23日與Robert Featter Stare在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾享年39歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Cate于1557年4月17日出生在英国英格兰戴文可利頓时，她的父亲Robert Cate31岁，母亲Margaret Bagwell27岁。她于1582年5月23日与Robert Featter Stare在英国英格兰戴文可利頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾享年39岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Cate
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: habitational name from any of several small farms in the East Netherlands known as Ten Cate, from katerstede ‘small cottage for a peasant or a laborer’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Cate was born on 17 April 1557, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Cate, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Bagwell, was 27. She married Robert Featter Stare on 23 May 1582, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1596, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Cate est née le 17 avril 1557, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Cate, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bagwell, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Featter Stare le 23 mai 1582, à Colyton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1596, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.Saint Andrew's Church, Colyton, East Dev: St Andrew's Church, Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Cate am 17. April 1557 in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Cate 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bagwell 27. Sie hat am 23. Mai 1582 in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom Robert Featter Stare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1596 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lincolnshire, England begraben.

Lei sposato Robert Featter Stare il 23 maggio 1582, nel Colyton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1596, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Lincolnshire, England.

ko.Saint Andrew's Church, Colyton, East Dev: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Cate(이)가 1557년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Cate(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bagwell(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1582년 5월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 Robert Featter Stare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert Featter Stare em 23 de maio de 1582, em Colyton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Saint Andrew's Church, Colyton, East Dev: ст андрю'с чурч, колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Cate родилась 17 апреля 1557 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Cate было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bagwell, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Featter Stare 23 мая 1582 г. в местности колитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1596 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности линколншир, Англия.
